instruction: Average score must ignore null sensor readings; use the right aggregate for that.
broken_query: SELECT device, avg(score) AS m FROM chqr_tasks.t_sensors_ag GROUP BY device
gold_query: SELECT device, avgIf(score, isNotNull(score)) AS m FROM chqr_tasks.t_sensors_ag GROUP BY device
simulated_error: Plain avg() folded NULL into the wrong denominator for sparse devices.
schema_hint: Nullable(Float32) column score on MergeTree t_sensors_ag.
setup_sql: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS chqr_tasks; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS chqr_tasks.t_sensors_ag; CREATE TABLE chqr_tasks.t_sensors_ag (device String, score Nullable(Float32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (device); INSERT INTO chqr_tasks.t_sensors_ag VALUES ('d1', 10), ('d1', NULL), ('d1', 20), ('d2', NULL), ('d2', NULL)
